chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The sneezing and the Naming (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/556)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/556)
text: عَطَسَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ إِصْبَعَهُ عَلَى أَنْفِهِ فَقَالَ رَغِمَ أَنْفِي لِلَّهِ رَغْماً دَاخِراً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Al Husayn Bin Nuaym, from Misma’a Bin Abdul Malik who said,

‘Once Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> sneezed, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of the worlds’, then made his<sup>asws</sup> fingers to be upon his nose, and he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> rub my<sup>asws</sup> nose for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, a humble rubbing’.
en.sarwar: 14. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from al-Husayn ibn Nu’aym from Misma’ ibn ‘Abd al- Malik who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) sneezed and said, ‘All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of the worlds,’ then he placed his finger over his nose and said, ‘Humble is my nose before Allah with complete humility.’”
